scripts.build: pnpm run build:workspace-sdk && pnpm run build:only
scripts.build:only: rm -rf dist && pnpm run css:build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:workspace-sdk: if [ -f ../../packages/datastar-kit/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter datastar-kit build; fi
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run css:watch & trap 'kill 0' EXIT; tsx src/index.ts
